LightningComponentBundle.description: Button that runs PdfGeneratorController against the current record using a configured Document Template.

property.name: documentTemplateId
property.label: Document Template ID
property.description: ID of the Document_Template__c to use. Takes precedence over name if both are set.

property.name: documentTemplateName
property.label: Document Template Name
property.description: Name of the Document_Template__c to use (used if ID is blank). More portable across orgs/environments than ID.

property.name: buttonVariant
property.label: Button Variant
property.description: One of: brand, neutral, success, destructive, brand-outline, etc.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Button Icon
property.description: SLDS utility icon name, e.g. utility:download, utility:print, utility:file.
